text.value: Have you gone to the healthcare facility since your delivery for a postnatal care visit?

I'd like to ask you a few questions about the quality of the services you received last time you went to the health facility. We will anonymously share this information with DHMT or other persons in the MOH so that they can improve the services that are provided. You can choose not to answer any question you don't want to. Is it ok for us to proceed?
Name: Age: years, months, days Contact person: House number: Kitongoji:
You're doing well and don't need to go to the health facility at this time.
To address an emergency postpartum danger sign
You need to go to the health facility for the following reasons:
To address a postpartum danger sign
Contact ID of the logged in user
Facility ID for the parent user
Name of the logged in user

Please continue to eat healthy and have more snacks to make sure that your baby gets enough milk from breastfeeding. It is very important for you to eat a balanced diet with a lot of vegetables and fruits and drink lots of water.
It's very important to Take iron and folic acid tablets to prevent anemia for at least 3 months after your baby's birth. Continue taking your iron and folic acid as directed by physician.
Within 6 weeks of your delivery, you should go to the health facility for a postnatal care visit to get Vitamin A supplements.

I would like to ask you a few questions that will help us improve the health services provided in your community in the future. You can decide you do not want to answer a question – just let me know if you prefer not to answer. Can we proceed?
First, I'm going to check for any postpartum danger signs.
You should go visit the health facility to get a checkup on your bleeding.
Is the client experiencing a lot of bleeding right now (3 or more pads from morning to midday)?
Begin by observing the mother and indicating if she has any of the following danger signs:

This is an URGENT and serious emergency. You should go to the nearest facility immediately. If it is near closing time for this facility, you should directly to nearest hospital.
I can help you arrange a driver to get to the health facility, but as I told you before that the program doesn't provide transport, so you are responsible for paying the full amount of the journey.
I will return in 3 days to make sure you completed this referral
If you have any problems before that time, please call me.
Discuss with client the advice she received for these conditions when she went to the facility including: Counseling, treatment, when to follow up. To be answered by the CHV
How is the condition of your caesarian section wound?
Based on your discussion do you think client needs to return to the facility for further checkup?

We've identified that you have a danger sign. Do not worry, because these conditions will be managed when you get to a health facilty.
Have you, in the past 3 days, gone to a health facility for any of these identified conditions?
Continue following the advice and treatment instructions you received at the health facility. If you condition worsens, return to the facility immediately.
No danger signs were identified, but if you develop any of the signs we discussed, you should go to a health facility immediately.

You should go to a health facility as soon as possible and within 24 hours for further screening.
I can help you arrange a driver to get to the health facility, but as I told you before that the program doesn't provide transport, so you are responsible for paying the full amount of the journey.
I will return in 3 days to make sure you completed this referral
If you have any problems before that time, please call me.
Indicate if the mother has any of the following non-emergency danger signs that require medical attention. Probe to understand if the condition requires medical attention:
Tenderness of the breast or cracked nipples
Pale pallor (note: look at client's palm and lip)
Severe pains in the muscles of the foot
Low urine output or leaking of urine
During your most recent Post-natal visit, which services did your baby receive?
Which district is the health facility located?
Where is the health facility located?
No, I didn't get a service
Yes, I got all the services at the faciltiy
Yes, I got some services but also had to go to another place as well for tests/invenstigations/other services.
Did you get the services at the facility you went to ?
I had no money to pay for the services
There was no regeants/tests at the faciltiy
The waiting time was too long. I decided to come back home.
Why did you not get the services?
During your most recent post-natal care visit, which services did you receive?
What did you go to the 2nd facility/pharmacy for?
Did someone come to your house and register you using a phone during a previous pregnancy?
What is the highest level of school you attended?
What is the highest level of school your husband/partner has attended?
Please enter an age between 18 and 90
Were you previously/ever enrolled in Safer Deliveries Program?
You and your husband/partner (or other family member) jointly
Who usually makes decisions about your health care? [Primary or ultimate decision-maker]
What is the woman's marital status?
To be answered by the CHV
Is the client you are attending currently married or living together with a man as if married?
To be answered by the CHV
Does your (husband/partner) have other wives or does he live with other women as if married?
Please enter a value between 1 and 10.
Including you, in total, how many wives or live-in partners does your partner have?
Does the woman's (husband/partner) usually live here with her?
To be answered by the CHV
How do you typically travel from your home to the healthcare facility for routine/non-emergency visits?
Typically, how long does it take for you to travel from your home to the nearest healthcare facility for a routine/non-emergency visit?
Hi , I'd like to check up on you to see how you are doing following the birth of your baby.
You and your husband/partner (or other family member) jointly
Yes, I got all the services at the faciltiy
Yes, I got some services but also had to go to another place as well for tests/invenstigations/other services.
No, I didn't get a service
There was no regeants/tests at the faciltiy
The waiting time was too long. I decided to come back home.
I had no money to pay for the services

bind.relevant: selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/c_section_condition ,"discharge_swelling") or selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_pale_pallor ,"yes") or selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_severe_frontal_headache ,"yes") or selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_blurred_vision ,"yes") or selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_urine ,"yes") or selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_dizziness ,"yes") or selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_exhaustion ,"yes") or selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_severe_lower_abdominal_pain ,"yes") or selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_vaginal_discharge ,"yes") or selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_fever_chills ,"yes") or selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_breathing_difficulty ,"yes") or selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_severe_pain_foot ,"yes") or selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_behavior ,"yes") or selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_breast ,"yes")

( /postpartum/had_c_section = "yes" and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/c_section_condition ,"clean") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_pale_pallor ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_severe_frontal_headache ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_blurred_vision ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_urine ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_dizziness ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_exhaustion ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_severe_lower_abdominal_pain ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_vaginal_discharge ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_fever_chills ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_breathing_difficulty ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_severe_pain_foot ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_behavior ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_breast ,"no")) or ( /postpartum/had_c_section = "no" and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_pale_pallor ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_severe_frontal_headache ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_blurred_vision ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_urine ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_dizziness ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_exhaustion ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_severe_lower_abdominal_pain ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_vaginal_discharge ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_fever_chills ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_breathing_difficulty ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_severe_pain_foot ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_behavior ,"no") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_other_danger_signs/postpartum_other_danger_signs_table/postpartum_breast ,"no"))

selected( /postpartum/quality_of_care/facility_district ,"north_a") or selected( /postpartum/quality_of_care/facility_district ,"north_b") or selected( /postpartum/quality_of_care/facility_district ,"central") or selected( /postpartum/quality_of_care/facility_district ,"south") or selected( /postpartum/quality_of_care/facility_district ,"west_a") or selected( /postpartum/quality_of_care/facility_district ,"west_b") or selected( /postpartum/quality_of_care/facility_district ,"urban") or selected( /postpartum/quality_of_care/facility_district ,"chakechake") or selected( /postpartum/quality_of_care/facility_district ,"micheweni") or selected( /postpartum/quality_of_care/facility_district ,"mkoani") or selected( /postpartum/quality_of_care/facility_district ,"wete")

bind.calculate: if((selected( /postpartum/postpartum_danger_signs/postpartum_emergency_danger_signs/postpartum_emergency_danger_signs_table/postpartum_severe_vaginal_bleeding ,"yes") and selected( /postpartum/postpartum_danger_signs/postpartum_emergency_danger_signs/postpartum_bleeding_right_now ,"yes")) or selected( /postpartum/postpartum_danger_signs/postpartum_emergency_danger_signs/postpartum_emergency_danger_signs_table/postpartum_convulsions ,"yes") or selected( /postpartum/postpartum_danger_signs/postpartum_emergency_danger_signs/postpartum_emergency_danger_signs_table/postpartum_unconscious ,"yes"),1,0)
